title: Export Individual Cards to PDF
excerpt: We distribute the data tracked in Monday.com to our board and other stakeholders. At the preference of our stakeholders, we must provide the data in a physical form for each meeting. We desperately need individual Cards …

posts.author: tfisher (Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
We distribute the data tracked in Monday.com to our board and other stakeholders. At the preference of our stakeholders, we must provide the data in a physical form for each meeting. We desperately need individual Cards to be exportable to a PDF.

How we utilize Monday.com: We use individual Cards to track cases, including ~20 different fields of detailed data. We use a customized Main Table view for quick overview of the Card data. We were previously using complicated formatted Excel documents and printing them to PDF. Monday.com allows us to customize the data in a less complicated fashion. However, my stakeholders still need to see each Card standalone, in addition to the customized Main Table overview. We desperately need this feature! Any suggestions are appreciated.
